name: Generate Random Float Value
short_description: Generates a random floating-point number within a specified range, rounded to two decimal places.

inputs.name: min_val
inputs.description: The minimum value (inclusive) for the random number generation.

inputs.name: max_val
inputs.description: The maximum value (inclusive) for the random number generation.

name: Value at Risk (VaR) for a Single Asset
short_description: Basic: Single asset portfolio VaR calculation.

inputs.name: portfolio_value
inputs.description: Current value of the portfolio

inputs.name: volatility
inputs.description: Daily volatility as a percentage

inputs.name: time_horizon
inputs.description: Time horizon in days

inputs.name: confidence
inputs.description: Confidence level as a percentage

name: Stock Return Value at Risk (VaR)
short_description: Calculates the Value at Risk (VaR) for a stock's return under market risk, based on an expected loss percentage and a specified confidence level.

inputs.name: asset_value
inputs.description: The current market value of the stock or asset.

inputs.name: loss_percent
inputs.description: The expected percentage loss of the asset's value under adverse market conditions (e.g., enter 2.5 for 2.5%).

inputs.name: confidence
inputs.description: The confidence level for the VaR calculation (e.g., enter 95 for 95%).

name: Multi-asset Portfolio VaR with Diversification
short_description: Calculates the Value at Risk (VaR) for a multi-asset portfolio, considering asset weights, volatilities, time horizon, and confidence level with diversification.

inputs.name: portfolio_value
inputs.description: Current total value of the portfolio.

inputs.name: w1
inputs.description: Weight of asset 1 in the portfolio (as a percentage, e.g., 20 for 20%).

inputs.name: w2
inputs.description: Weight of asset 2 in the portfolio (as a percentage, e.g., 30 for 30%).

inputs.name: volatility1
inputs.description: Volatility of asset 1 (as a percentage, e.g., 1.5 for 1.5%).

inputs.name: volatility2
inputs.description: Volatility of asset 2 (as a percentage, e.g., 2.0 for 2.0%).

inputs.name: volatility3
inputs.description: Volatility of asset 3 (as a percentage, e.g., 2.5 for 2.5%).

inputs.name: time_horizon
inputs.description: Time horizon for VaR calculation (e.g., in days).

inputs.name: confidence
inputs.description: Confidence level for VaR calculation (as a percentage, e.g., 99.0 for 99%).

name: Time-Horizon Adjusted Value at Risk (VaR)
short_description: Calculates Value at Risk (VaR) for a portfolio given its value, daily volatility, confidence level, and time horizon, using the standard normal z-score.

inputs.name: portfolio_value
inputs.description: Current value of the portfolio.

inputs.name: volatility
inputs.description: Daily volatility of the portfolio in percentage (e.g., 2.5 for 2.5%).

inputs.name: time_horizon
inputs.description: Time horizon in days for which VaR is calculated.

inputs.name: confidence
inputs.description: Confidence level for the VaR calculation in percentage (e.g., 95 for 95%).

name: Multi-factor Portfolio VaR
short_description: Calculates Value at Risk (VaR) for a portfolio considering market, credit, and liquidity risks over a specified time horizon and confidence level.

inputs.name: portfolio_value
inputs.description: Current value of the investment portfolio

inputs.name: market_vol
inputs.description: Market volatility (as a percentage)

inputs.name: credit_risk
inputs.description: Credit risk (as a percentage)

inputs.name: liquidity_risk
inputs.description: Liquidity risk (as a percentage)

inputs.name: time_horizon
inputs.description: Time horizon for VaR calculation (in days)

inputs.name: confidence
inputs.description: Confidence level for VaR calculation (as a percentage)
